summary: Experienced data solutions developer with a strong foundation in SQL Server, SSRS/SSIS, backup and restore strategies, performance tuning, and database monitoring. Background in software development using JavaScript (ReactJS), C#, and Dynamics 365 CRM. Skilled in data encryption, masking, and automation solutions. Proficient with cloud tools (Azure), Python, DAX, and Power Query. Open work permit holder, ready to contribute to dynamic teams in Canada.
certifications: Protect Your Business: Cybersecurity in Telework
Digitize Your Business Step by Step with Google Tools
Introduction to Web Development: HTML and CSS

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained software applications using JavaScript and C#.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design and implement new features.
Automated routine processes, enhancing efficiency and accuracy.

experience.title: BO Automation & Multicountry Analysis
bullets: Implemented database automation solutions using SSIS and T-SQL.
Designed and deployed reports with SSRS for various business units.
Managed backup and restore procedures and applied data encryption/masking policies.
Tuned SQL performance and implemented monitoring solutions.
Utilized Ola Hallengren scripts for maintenance and health checks.
Contributed to cloud-based data integration using Azure.
Built reports and dashboards with Power BI, Power Query, DAX, and Python.

bullets: Analyzed data to support municipal projects and initiatives.
Developed software tools to improve data collection and analysis.
Collaborated with various departments to optimize workflows.
